questions.question: Explain any three challenges in distributed systems with examples.
expectedPoints: Heterogeneity: Differences in hardware, OS, programming languages - Example: Integrating Windows and Linux systems
Concurrency: Multiple clients accessing shared resources - Example: Multiple users editing the same document
Security: Protecting resources from unauthorized access - Example: Secure online banking transactions
Scalability: Handling growth in users and resources - Example: Supporting millions of users on social media

questions.question: Describe the Remote Procedure Call (RPC) mechanism with a diagram and explain the role of client and server stubs.
expectedPoints: Definition: RPC allows calling remote procedures as if they were local
Client stub: Marshals parameters, communicates with server, appears as local procedure
Server stub: Unmarshals parameters, calls actual procedure, returns results
Advantages: Location transparency, simplicity for programmers
Challenges: Parameter passing, error handling, performance overhead
